title: Startastic Hats CIT
description: A collection of awesome and adorable hats to satisfy your needs!
body:
![Startastic Hats Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d62f41c65cb002aaba494ef46882c8b5f280db55.png)
Startastic Hats, formerly known as Hoshi's Hat Pack, is a CIT texture pack that features a ginormous collection of hats to wear in your worlds.

The pack requires [**OptiFine**](https://optifine.net/home) or a **CIT mod** to work. Use OptiFine for emissive textures.

![Glow-in-the-dark headset!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2dc4758ab4cae21e65f79c3a1311749990c24ac_0.webp)

## ⁉️ How To Use
1. Move the downloaded file to your _resource packs_ folder.
2. To get one of the hats, all you have to do is rename a Carved Pumpkin to the given "Name".
3. You can find the names in the readme.txt file inside of the pack.

> As of v1.0.7.4, the pack contains 220 hats.
